title: Beldray BEL01610 2 in 1 Iron & Garment Steamer - Mini Travel Iron, Single Temperature, Use on All Fabrics, Heatproof Storage Base, Non-Stick Ceramic Soleplate, 100ml Water Tank, 1200W, Platinum/Grey
features: Steam, refresh and sanitise your garments with the Beldray 2 in 1 iron & garment steamer, perfect for home and travel use.
Measuring 14.3 x 17.5 x 8 cm,this steamer boasts a compact design which can be easily stored away in your cupboards or luggage.
Designed with one temperature technology, this portable steam iron is suitable for all fabric types without the risk of burns.
The heatproof base and one temperature technology means you can rest assured that your garments and surfaces are protected from burns.
Thanks to the non-stick ceramic soleplate, this iron offers optimum performance providing a smooth glide and a powerful vertical steam.
